rdataset 1.0.0
  • Reference

get_bin_representative_sequences

Source: R/RcppExports.R
get_bin_representative_sequences.Rd

Get the representative sequences of the bins in an instance of the 'Dataset' class.

get_bin_representative_sequences(data, type = "otu")

Arguments

data

an Rcpp::XPtr<Dataset> pointer to an instance of the 'Dataset' c++ class.

type,

string indicating the type of clusters. Default = "otu".

Value

data.frame

See also

[dataset$get_bin_representative_sequences()]

Examples


  miseq <- miseq_sop_example()
#> ℹ Added 2425 sequences.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 sequence abundances.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 sequence taxonomies.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 asv bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 63 phylotype bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 19 samples to treatments.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bin taxonomies.

  # For examples sake, select first 531 sequences to be the representatives
  num_bins <- miseq$get_num_bins("otu")
  rep_names <- miseq$get_sequence_names()[1:num_bins]
  bin_names <- miseq$get_bin_names()

  assign_bin_representative_sequences(miseq$data,
                                      bin_names, rep_names, "otu")
#> [1] 531



  get_bin_representative_sequences(miseq$data, "otu")
